assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 15: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row with serena_ui as Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md

Jira Configuration marked 'Preserved (existing)'. Code Intelligence Limitations table shows serena_backend as 'Preserved (existing)' and serena_ui as 'Added (new)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md has '### serena_backend — Already Configured' with 'This instance is already present in the existing Project Configuration' and '### serena_ui — Newly Discovered' with 'This instance was NOT present in the existing Project Configuration'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-41: naming convention 'mcp__<instance>__<tool>' preserved, example block with serena_backend preserved identically, serena_backend limitation 'rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use' preserved at line 40. Only new content is line 41: 'serena_ui: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 43-47 show Bug Configuration with Bug issue type ID: 10001, Bug template: docs/bug-template.md, Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks — identical to input. changes-log.md reports 'Status: **Up to date** — all fields unchanged (Bug issue type ID: 10001, Bug template: docs/bug-template.md, Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks)'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md states 'User was asked about Security Configuration and declined. Security Configuration section was not added.' changes-log.md confirms 'Status: **Not added** — user declined when asked.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the file.
